item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "awk 'NR==183 {print \"    // Registered in app-server/src/extensions.rs.\"} NR<=183 {print} NR>183 {print}' ./ext/repo-intelligence/src/extension.rs > temp_file && mv temp_file ./ext/repo-intelligence/src/extension.rs"

item.text:
I've successfully added the requested comments to the code:

1. In `./ext/repo-intelligence/src/extension.rs`, I added the comment `// Registered in app-server/src/extensions.rs.` above the `install` function.

2. In `./app-server/src/extensions.rs`, I added the comment `// Registers codex-repo-intelligence-extension.` above the call site that registers the extension.

Both changes have been applied correctly. The code now clearly indicates:
- Where the extension is registered (in app-server/src/extensions.rs)
- That the extension is registered in the app-server (via the new comment)

These comments will help future developers understand the relationship between the extension crate and its registration in the app-server.
